lever.name: MR8 register tile for packed blocked matmul

behavior_proof.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1293453 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1293453 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf47-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture
isomorphism: Each output element kept ascending-k product accumulation in the candidate state.
Column and row remainder coverage stayed disjoint and complete.
Dtype, shape, error, tie-breaking, and RNG surfaces were unchanged.
No horizontal reductions or reassociation were introduced.

next_route: Do not repeat MR row-tile widening on this kernel. Reprofile current main and route GEMM work to a materially different primitive, such as output-write avoidance in Schur callers, thread-affinity/scheduling, or a parity-contract bead for recursive/Strassen-style accumulation if the oracle permits tolerance rather than bit identity.
